underlying_goal: Fix a Next.js voice assistant web app (deployment, voice recognition bugs) and set up a local Python voice loop service with STT/LLM/TTS pipeline
friction_detail: Voice service repeatedly failed due to venv pip issues, wrong  model names, API key rotation bugs, and rate limiting — requiring multiple fix-retry cycles.
brief_summary: User needed deployment fixes for their Next.js app and a working local Python voice loop; deployment was fixed but the voice service required many iterations to debug API key and model issues with partial success.
